vibe: Apple Wallet, Airbnb, Wealthfront, Linear - Premium Members Club

global_rules.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-dashboard-link').

typography.instructions: Ensure Google Sans Flex is imported. Avoid Inter for headings. Use negative letter-spacing for large text.

sidebar.layout: Fixed left sidebar, 280px width, flex column, custom scrollbar.
sidebar.bottom_section: Pill-shaped AED Balance card (bg-[#15161A] border-[#27272A]) + Profile card (Avatar + Name + Tier).

cards.style: bg-[#15161A] border border-[#27272A] rounded-[24px] overflow-hidden relative

buttons.primary: bg-[#FACC15] text-black font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#EAB308] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(250,204,21,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#15161A] text-white border border-[#27272A] font-semibold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#1E1F24] hover:border-zinc-600 transition-all
buttons.glass: backdrop-blur-md bg-black/40 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-black/60 transition-all

progress_rings.style: SVG-based circular progress indicators. Track stroke: #27272A. Progress stroke: #FACC15. Stroke width: 6-8px. Rounded caps.

badges.coming_soon: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 text-white text-xs font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wider

pages.Dashboard: Welcome text (lucide-react Hand icon instead of emoji). Milestone card with gold accent. Tier progress ring. Quick action buttons. Recent activity list.
pages.My_Progress: Large central circular progress ring. Timeline of milestones below it. High use of negative space.
pages.Benefits_Ladder: Horizontal or grid bento progression: Co-Owner Member -> Priority Co-Owner -> Co-Owner Circle -> Elite Co-Owner. Visual locks for unachieved tiers.
pages.Dubai_Properties: Airbnb-style grid of large property cards. Hero images, 'Coming Soon' badges, investment filters, 'Join Waitlist' primary CTAs.
pages.Allocation_Interests: Large selectable category cards with checkmark indicators when active. Summary side-panel or sticky bottom bar.
pages.Webinar_Events: Featured event hero card. Tabs for Upcoming/Registered/Recorded. Curated list format.
pages.Invite_and_Earn: Referral link copy component, share buttons, list of referral missions/achievements.
pages.Leaderboard: Podium visualization for top 3 (gold/silver/bronze accents). Weekly/Monthly/All-time tabs. List view for rest of users.
pages.Community_Updates: Curated feed. Post cards with like/save/share actions. High-quality imagery attached.
pages.Co_Owner_Benefits: Immersive aspirational cards (airport transfers, private events). Focus on imagery and luxury typography.
pages.Support_Center: 3 primary action cards at top (Chat, Email, Call). Accordion-style FAQs below.
pages.Settings: Clean list of toggles, profile edit inputs, security settings, notification preferences.
